summary: Frontend testing of How To Use page (/how-to-use) completed successfully. All 8 step images load correctly with real populated screenshots from demo cases. Page scrolling, navigation, and mobile responsiveness all working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: How To Use page at /how-to-use fully tested. All 8 step images (live-step1-signin.png through live-step8-reports.png) load correctly with real demo case data. Mobile hamburger menu works. Back button navigates to home. Steps 9 (Barrister View) and 10 (Export) are text-only cards and render correctly.

step1_signin.content: Real login screen with Welcome Back modal, Sign in with Google button

step2_dashboard.content: Real dashboard showing 4 cases, 45 documents, 44 timeline events

step3_documents.content: R v Homann case with actual documents listed

step4_timeline.content: Dummy Murder Appeal Demonstration with timeline events

step5_grounds.content: Grounds analysis with Prosecution Failure and Manifest Excess findings

step6_legal.content: Legal Framework with Crimes Act 1900 (NSW) legislation

step7_progress.content: Progress tab with AI Case Progress Analysis, Deadline Tracker

step8_reports.content: Reports tab with Full Detailed Report and Quick Summary options

ui_elements_tested.mobile_hamburger_menu: PASS - opens/closes correctly with all nav links
